title: Estuarine Research Technician
description: Support eelgrass and water-quality monitoring at Padilla Bay NERR, including field sampling and data entry.

title: Conservation Programs Associate
description: Coordinate conservation education and community science programs for the Seattle Aquarium.

title: Aquatic Resources Biologist
description: Assess and manage state-owned aquatic lands and nearshore habitat for the WA DNR Aquatic Resources Division.

title: Marine Field Research Assistant
description: Assist with nearshore community surveys and sample processing for Salish Sea Research Cooperative projects.

title: Shellfish Restoration Technician
description: Support native shellfish and kelp restoration projects across Puget Sound nearshore sites.

title: Fisheries Biologist (Salmon Recovery)
description: Conduct stock assessment and population modeling to support West Coast salmon recovery efforts.

title: Marine Education Specialist
description: Deliver marine science education programs and interpretive experiences at Point Defiance Zoo and Aquarium.

title: Coastal Monitoring Data Analyst
description: Analyze long-term coastal monitoring datasets in R and prepare summaries for Washington Sea Grant programs.

title: Research Reserve Education Coordinator
description: Coordinate K-12 and community education programs for Padilla Bay National Estuarine Research Reserve.

title: Lab Technician, Marine Invertebrates
description: Process and identify marine invertebrate samples and maintain collections at Friday Harbor Laboratories.

title: Nearshore Habitat Field Crew Member
description: Seasonal field crew supporting nearshore habitat assessments across the northern Salish Sea.

title: Science Communication Intern
description: Develop blog posts, social content, and exhibit copy for the Seattle Aquarium conservation team.

title: Marine Spatial Data Specialist
description: Manage spatial datasets and produce maps supporting aquatic lands management for WA DNR.

title: Kelp Monitoring Field Assistant
description: Support kelp forest monitoring surveys along the outer coast for Olympic Coast National Marine Sanctuary.

title: Salmon Recovery Project Assistant
description: Assist with salmon and steelhead recovery projects and partner coordination at Long Live the Kings.

title: Aquarium Conservation Educator
description: Engage visitors at the MaST Center touch tanks and lead marine science demonstrations.

title: Graduate Research Fellow, Ocean Warming
description: Funded fellowship investigating climate impacts on Salish Sea nearshore communities.

title: Field Research Coordinator
description: Coordinate field logistics and long-term ecological monitoring on the northeast Pacific coast for Hakai Institute.

title: Marine Protected Areas Analyst
description: Research and advocate for the protection of high-value ocean habitats at Marine Conservation Institute.

title: Outreach and Volunteer Coordinator
description: Recruit and coordinate volunteers across The Whale Trail's network of Salish Sea viewing sites.

title: Ecological Data Coordinator
description: Maintain monitoring databases and run QA/QC on long-term estuarine datasets at Padilla Bay NERR.

title: Postgraduate Research Associate, Intertidal Ecology
description: Conduct intertidal community surveys and statistical analysis for a multi-year warming study at FHL.

title: Habitat Restoration Field Technician
description: Seasonal technician supporting kelp and shellfish restoration plantings and monitoring.

title: Community Science Program Assistant
description: Support volunteer-driven beach and water monitoring programs for Washington Sea Grant.
